tactic.name: archival_first
tactic.description: Bias toward Common Crawl, Wayback, Archive.is, and IPWB before live fetches.

critic.summary: Coverage gaps remain, so the next cycle should bias toward broader archival and search discovery.
critic.router_rationale: Coverage gaps persist across the highlighted states (zero statutes recovered except RI), so biasing toward archival discovery before live fetches should surface archived PDFs or redirects for the missing jurisdictions and satisfy the critic’s request for broader discovery.

llm_review.rationale: Coverage gaps persist across the highlighted states (zero statutes recovered except RI), so biasing toward archival discovery before live fetches should surface archived PDFs or redirects for the missing jurisdictions and satisfy the critic’s request for broader discovery.
